message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam lifelineStrategy solid
skinparam noteBackgroundColor #FFFFCC
skinparam noteBorderColor #CCCCCC
skinparam noteFontColor #000000
skinparam participantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam participantBorderColor #000000
skinparam participantFontColor #000000
skinparam actorBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam actorBorderColor #000000
skinparam actorFontColor #000000

actor user
participant "Gstreamer Pipeline" as GP
participant "realsensesrc" as RS
participant "librealsense2" as LR
participant "GStreamer" as GS

user -> GP: load GSt pipeline with realsensesrc
GP -> RS: realsensesrc serial=728...
activate RS
RS -> RS: pipeline goto GST_STATE_READY
deactivate RS

GP -> RS: create
activate RS
RS -> LR: rs2::context.query_devices()
activate LR
LR --> RS: rs2::device_list
deactivate LR
RS -> LR: select device by serial
activate LR
LR --> RS: rs2::sensor
deactivate LR
note right of LR: Select device

loop for (info: rs2::rs2_camera_info)
    RS -> LR: rs2::device.supports(info)
    activate LR
    LR --> RS: bool
    deactivate LR
    RS -> LR: rs2::device.get_info(info)
    activate LR
    LR --> RS: const char* info_string
    deactivate LR
    RS -> RS: store info
end

RS -> GS: gst_tag_setter_add_tag_valist_values(...,infos, NULL)
activate GS
note right of GS: Register per-stream metadata as Gst tags
deactivate GS

RS -> LR: rs2::sensor.get_stream_profiles()
activate LR
LR --> RS: std::vector<rs2::stream_profile>
deactivate LR

loop for (profile: std::vector<rs2::stream_profile>)
    RS -> RS: Create profile_list of supported profiles
end

RS -> GS: g_object_class_install_properties(...,...,options)
activate GS
note right of GS: Install all supported video profiles as an option
deactivate GS

loop for (option: rs2::rs2_option)
    RS -> LR: rs2::sensor.supports(option)
    activate LR
    LR --> RS: bool
    deactivate LR
    RS -> LR: rs2::sensor.get_option_range
    activate LR
    LR --> RS: rs2::option_range
    deactivate LR
    RS -> RS: store option
end

RS -> GS: g_object_class_install_properties(...,...,options)
activate GS
note right of GS: Install all supported RS camera options as properties/options
deactivate GS

RS -> GS: gst_bus_add_watch(bus, bus_call...);
activate GS
note right of GS: Register callback for parameter changes
deactivate GS

GP -> RS: caps negotiation (CAPS)
note right of RS: - pixel_format\n- width\n- height\n- framerate

RS -> RS: pipeline goto GST_STATE_PLAYING
GP -> RS: state=playing
RS -> LR: rs2::sensor.start()
activate LR
RS -> RS: pipeline goto GST_STATE_READY
RS -> LR: rs2::sensor.stop()
deactivate LR

@enduml
